summary: Profile features testing completed. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) working correctly. Frontend pages for Customer Profile, Rider Profile, Payment History, Notifications, Help & Support, and Privacy & Security are functional. Fixed navigation issue where menu items showed 'Coming soon!' instead of navigating to actual pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CustomerProfile.js menu items were showing 'Coming soon!' toast instead of navigating to actual pages. Changed onClick handler from toast.info() to navigate(item.path)
Visit Cart 'Use Current' location button is correctly implemented but only visible when cart has items
All new profile/bank APIs are properly implemented with correct authentication and role checks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile features are fully functional. Customer Profile shows stats (Visits, Spent, Viewed) and menu items now navigate correctly to Payment History, Notifications, Help & Support, and Privacy & Security pages. Rider Profile shows bank account section with add/update functionality. Visit Cart has 'Use Current' location button that uses browser Geolocation API with OpenStreetMap Nominatim for reverse geocoding.

customer_profile_stats.details: Shows Visits, Spent, Viewed stats from /api/customer/wallet

customer_profile_edit.details: Edit mode with location capture button for address

customer_profile_menu_navigation.details: Menu items now navigate to actual pages instead of showing 'Coming soon!' toast

help_support_page.details: Shows contact options and FAQ section

privacy_security_page.details: Shows security status and change password option

rider_profile.details: Shows profile info, vehicle details, and bank account section

rider_bank_account.details: Add/update bank account with masked account number display

visit_cart_location.details: 'Use Current' button implemented with Geolocation API (visible when cart has items)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real MongoDB operations
